playbook.intent: Multi-product noise → one product that earns the next week's attention.
playbook.scope: 20-minute check across all live side-projects: which moved on MRR, signups, or traffic — pick the one product that earns next week's attention, and tag the rest for maintenance only.

success-criteria.criterion: One winner picked for next-week focus

stage.name: Collect
stage.intent: All product metrics in one place in under 10 minutes.

tasks.task: Pull MRR, signups, and traffic for each product

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every product has fresh numbers.

stage.name: Triage
stage.intent: RICE the products and pick a winner.

tasks.task: Score each product against a 4-factor RICE
Pick the one with the strongest delta
Tag the rest as 'maintenance only' for the week

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when a single winner is documented.

stage.name: Plan
stage.intent: Set the next week with one product in the foreground.

tasks.task: Schedule maintenance windows for the rest

stage.decision-gate: Done once outcomes are in the calendar.

extra.value: [Deep analytics — quick scan only, Product death decisions — that lives in portfolio rotation, Multi-week planning — single-week scope]
[≥2 live products in the portfolio, Minimal metrics dashboard per product]
[Treating the playbook as a checklist instead of a decision tree, Skipping decision gates when intermediate progress feels good, Letting tools or platforms replace the founder's own judgement]

['Did each stage produce its named output or get explicitly skipped with a note?', 'Were decision gates respected or quietly bypassed?', 'Is the evidence trail strong enough to defend the verdict externally?']

{human: faion get-content weekly-portfolio-metric-scan --format md, agent: faion get-content weekly-portfolio-metric-scan --format context, json: faion get-content weekly-portfolio-metric-scan --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft from brainstorm-2026-05-17, persona P2 (indie hacker)'}]
